title: Personal Support Worker Retirement Savings Innovation Program– Call for Concepts – Step 1 - Canada.ca
content:
## Personal Support Worker Retirement Savings Innovation Program– Call for Concepts – Step 1
The Personal Support Worker Retirement Savings Innovation Program (PSWRSIP) will provide funding to eligible initial recipients that are able to provide retirement savings incentives through tax-assisted private savings vehicles to personal support workers (PSWs) without workplace retirement security coverage.
- If you have questions, send an email to edsc.pssp-psw.esdc@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
- We will answer questions sent before January 23, 2025, at 12:00 pm (noon) EST. Please use the following naming convention in the subject line of your email when sending a question: Question-PSW-Organization Name.
- If you need accessibility-related accommodation, email us at edsc.pssp-psw.esdc@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca with the details.
- We strive to accommodate your needs. We will accept accessibility requests until January 17, 2025, at 12:00 pm (noon) EST.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
